subject: Your employer brand is losing candidates before they apply
body:
Hi [Name],

Checked your Glassdoor page — 3.4 stars with no public responses from the company. Candidates research this before even clicking 'Apply'.

72% of job seekers say employer reputation directly affects their decision. Right now, your career page doesn't tell the story your team deserves.

[Product] helps companies build and manage employer brand content that converts — one client tripled qualified applications in 8 weeks without increasing headcount spend.

Want a quick audit of your current employer brand presence?
why_it_works: public data icebreaker + candidate psychology stat + offer instead of call
